Sentences: Anō ḥōxa ndōmex bōṯar xōla, bes emḥar nqum baҁṣofra.

Naḥna nzelna ҁal ṭūra, w-eṯ čū mōya b-tarba.
Att čū tḥmel leḥma kulle yōma, ella tḥmel yōmaḥ bas.
Ilōha yiḥmel qriṯaḥ, w-malka yiḥkem b-ḥeqqōṯa.
Law kān kiršō kṯīr, anō hawyōn bni bayṯa ġḏīṯa.
Leḥmaḥ nʕmel men qamḥa, w-xōla nḥaṭṭ l-ḥunūya.
Ṯōḏa ttaẖlen l-berča, w-ḥōṯa ttaẖlen l-ebṛa.
Čū nġofrin lti maḥiṭ ҁemmaynaḥ illa b-šlōma.
Yōma ti yṯēle, niktob, nqra, w-nšmaҁ liššōnaḥ.
— Šlōma, ḥōna; ayka zelt emḥar? — Zelt ҁal sūqa b-Dimašq.
— Eṯ mōya b-bayṯa? — Ay, eṯ mōya w-leḥma kman.
— Ma šmaẖ? — Šmay Mīxāʾel, w-anō men Maҁlūla.
— Tbaҁē qahwa? — Lō, tbaҁē mōya barda, ġafurlēḥ.
— Ayka emmay? — Hiya b-kanīsa, tṣalli ҁal ōmṯaḥ.
— Nroḥ ҁal ṭūra? — Nroḥ bōṯar ṣahra yṭlaҁ.
— Šu ʕamlet yōma? — Ktabet darsa w-smeҁet ṣawṯa.
— Ḥalya l-yōma! — Ay, šimša ṭāba w-qriṯa mrayḥa.
— Tḏakkar tarba? — Ay, tarba daqqa bēn bayṯa w-sekkṯa.
— Nḥki b-siryōn? — Nḥki šwayya šwayya, bes b-liššōnaḥ.
Yalla nroḥ ḥōxa, bas nḥki b-siryōn la-kulle darsa.
Ana ʕam download l-ṣawṯa, w-bōṯar nšmaҁ leḥmaḥ b-liššōna.

Bonjour, žičča; yōma nʕmel qṣaṣa b-arōmay.

Ḥāfeẓ ҁal šlōma b-femmak w-la tqol kelma qasiya.
Qāren bēn l-jumlēn w-iktob farqa ṣġīra.
Ṣaḥḥeḥ l-aẖṭāʾ, bes ḥāfeẓ ҁal maҁna l-naṣṣ.
